story_summary: A transition meme montage opens on two “before transition” portrait cards of the same subject with white text boxes, then flips into six golden-hour rooftop “after transition” portrait cards of the same subject in a pink dress, all using editable white banner labels.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus scene-cut review and midpoint-frame extraction
source_sampling.notes: Exact cuts were confirmed at 2.933333, 5.933333, 6.566667, 7.633333, 8.300000, 9.300000, and 10.066667 seconds via scene detection plus frame review. The top white label boxes are source-authentic and should remain editable in Shotstack.

audio_notes: Audio was extracted directly from the input video into source_audio.mp3 and should be used as the default Shotstack audio source.

scenes.summary: Close portrait of the pre-transition subject in a black jacket and gray scarf with a large white “BEFORE TRANSITION” banner at the top and a small “wait for it!” box near the center.
on_screen_text: Small white box reads “wait for it!”.

scenes.summary: A second pre-transition portrait shows the same subject in a white T-shirt with folded arms, again with the top “BEFORE TRANSITION” banner and the centered “wait for it!” label.
on_screen_text: Small white box reads “wait for it!”.
scenes.environment: Soft neutral background with plants out of focus.

scenes.summary: First after-transition rooftop portrait of the same subject with long brunette hair and a pink dress at golden hour.
scenes.environment: Golden-hour rooftop terrace with sky and concrete pillar.

scenes.summary: Second after-transition rooftop portrait, now with a side-facing pose in the same pink dress and sunset light.
scenes.environment: Same rooftop and warm sunset palette.

scenes.summary: Third after-transition rooftop portrait with the subject touching her hair and facing the camera.
scenes.environment: Same rooftop terrace and golden-hour sun.

scenes.summary: Fourth after-transition portrait shows a closer crop with flowing hair and the same pink dress.
scenes.environment: Same rooftop, sunset shadows, and sky backdrop.

scenes.summary: Fifth after-transition rooftop portrait with a lower seated or leaned pose and the same styling.
scenes.environment: Same rooftop with golden railings and blue sky.

scenes.summary: Final after-transition rooftop portrait holds on the pink-dress look with the same top white banner.
